

##### Required Package Installation

install.packages("Seurat")
install.packages("dplyr")
install.packages("tidyr")
install.packages("BiocManager")
BiocManager::install("UCell")
install.packages("ggpubr")
install.packages("devtools")
install.packages("spdep")
install.packages("scatterpie")
install.packages("reshape")
install.packages("cetcolor")
install.packages("UCell")
install.packages("clusterProfiler")
BiocManager::install("UCell")
install.packages("enrichplot")

##### Load Required Libraries

library(Seurat)
library(UCell)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(BiocManager)
library(ggpubr)
library(spdep)
library(scatterpie)
library(reshape)
library(cetcolor)
library(EnhancedVolcano)
library(mclust)
library(clusterProfiler)
library(enrichplot)


## Load Integrated Seurat Object

BRCL_skin_merged <- readRDS(
  file ="D:/RDATA/lesion_BRCL_skin_merged.Rds"
)


## Dimensionality Reduction and Clustering Visualization

DimPlot(BRCL_skin_merged, reduction = "pca")

DimPlot(
  BRCL_skin_merged,
  reduction = "umap",
  label = TRUE,
  pt.size = 1
)

## Cell2location Deconvolution

# Cell type inference was performed following the workflow described in:
# "Cell2location: Deconvoluting spatial spots"
# available at:
# https://github.com/NidhiSDey/leish-ME
#
# This analysis generated a file containing q05 cell abundance estimates
# for each spatial transcriptomic spot.


#Data Import

cell2location_abundances <- read.csv(
  "D:/RDATA/lesiononly_q05_cell_abundance_w_sf.csv"
)

## Verify Spot ID Correspondence Between Metadata and Deconvolution Matrix

table(BRCL_skin_merged$orig.ident)

rownames(
  BRCL_skin_merged@meta.data %>%
    filter(orig.ident == "002")
)

length(
  rownames(
    BRCL_skin_merged@meta.data %>%
      filter(orig.ident == "002")
  )
)

## Update Cell2location Abundance Matrix

cell2location_abundances <- read.csv(
  "D:/RDATA/lesiononly_q05_cell_abundance_w_sf_barcoded.csv"
)

## Metadata Formatting and Integration

rownames(cell2location_abundances) <- cell2location_abundances$new_spotid

cell_types <- colnames(cell2location_abundances)

# Remove new_spotid column
cell_types <- cell_types[2:length(cell_types)]

cell2location_abundances <- cell2location_abundances[, cell_types]

## Add Deconvolution Metadata to Seurat Object

BRCL_skin_merged <- AddMetaData(
  BRCL_skin_merged,
  metadata = cell2location_abundances
)


## Cell Type Color Palette Definition

my_colors1 <- c(
  # Dendritic cells 
  "DC1" = "#33A1C9",
  "DC2" = "#33A1C9",
  "MigDC" = "#33A1C9",
  "moDC1" = "#33A1C9",
  "moDC2" = "#33A1C9",
  "moDC3" = "#33A1C9",
  
  # Keratinocytes
  "DifferentiatedKC" = "#FEE08B",
  "DifferentiatedKC." = "#FEE08B",
  "ProliferatingKC" = "#FEE08B",
  "UndifferentiatedKC." = "#FEE08B",
  
  # Fibroblasts 
  "F1" = "#B2FF8A",
  "F2" = "#B2FF8A",
  "F3" = "#B2FF8A",
  
  # ILCs 
  "ILC13" = "#F6B8A0",
  "ILC1NK" = "#F6B8A0",
  "ILC2" = "#F6B8A0",
  
  # Langerhans cells
  "LC1" = "#E78AC3",
  "LC2" = "#E78AC3",
  "LC3" = "#E78AC3",
  "LC4" = "#E78AC3",
  
  # Lymphatic endothelial 
  "LE1" = "#8C6D45",
  "LE2" = "#8C6D45",
  
  # Macrophages e Monocytes 
  "Macro1" = "#E08214",
  "Macro2" = "#E08214",
  "Infmono" = "#E08214",
  "Mono" = "#E08214",
  
  # Other immune cells
  "Mastcell" = "#A6611A",
  "NK" = "#1B7837",
  "Plasma" = "#E6EF05",
  "Tc" = "#b2182b", 
  "Th" = "#2bb218",
  "Treg" = "#9f18b2",
  
  # Structal cells
  "Melanocyte" = "#000000",
  "Pericyte1noninflamm" = "#BABABA",
  "Pericyte2inflamm" = "#BABABA",
  "Schwann1" = "#FC9272",
  "Schwann2" = "#FC9272",
  
  # Vascular endothelial
  "VE1" = "#18b29f",
  "VE2" = "#18b29f",
  "VE3" = "#18b29f"
)


## Function to Retrieve Top N Cell Types Per Spot

abundance_df <- df

get_top_n_celltypes <- function(abundance_df, n = 3) {
  
  top_celltypes <- t(
    apply(abundance_df, 1, function(row) {
      
      top_idx <- order(row, decreasing = TRUE)[1:n]
      
      result <- rep(0, length(row))
      result[top_idx] <- row[top_idx]
      names(result) <- names(row)
      
      return(result)
    })
  )
  
  return(as.data.frame(top_celltypes))
}


## Extract Top Cell Types Per Spot

top5_cells <- get_top_n_celltypes(
  cell2location_abundances,
  n = 3
)

## Retrieve Spatial Coordinates and Metadata

metadata <- BRCL_skin_merged@meta.data

image_names <- Images(BRCL_skin_merged)

print(image_names)

all_coords <- list()

for (i in 1:length(image_names)) {
  
  coords <- GetTissueCoordinates(
    BRCL_skin_merged,
    image = image_names[i]
  )
  
  all_coords[[i]] <- coords
}

## Combine Spatial Coordinates Across Samples

spatial_coords <- do.call(rbind, all_coords)

print(head(spatial_coords))

## Spatial_coords <- GetTissueCoordinates

top3_abundances <- get_top_n_celltypes(
  metadata[, cell_types], n = 3
)

plot_data_top3 <- cbind(
  spatial_coords, top3_abundances
)

plot_data_top3$sample <- BRCL_skin_merged$orig.ident

ggplot() +
  geom_scatterpie(data = plot_data_top3,
                  aes(x = imagerow, y = imagecol),
                  cols = cell_types,
                  pie_scale = 0.25,
                  color = NA) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = my_colors1) +
  coord_equal() +
  theme_void() +
  facet_wrap(~sample) +
  labs(title = "Cell Type Composition")



## Definition of UCell Senescence Gene Signature

DefaultAssay(BRCL_skin_merged) <- "SCT"


Senesc_genelist <- c(
  "ATF5", "CDKN1A", "SESN2",
  "MAPK11", "MAPK14", "NFKB2", "TP53"
)

## Visualization of Individual Marker Gene Distribution

SpatialFeaturePlot(
  BRCL_skin_merged,
  feature = c(
    "ATF5", "CDKN1A", "SESN2",
    "MAPK11", "MAPK14",
    "NFKB2", "TP53"
  ),
  image.alpha = 0,
  images = "X002",
  pt.size.factor = 3200
)

## Calculation of UCell Module Scores

gene_set_ucel <- list(Senescence = Senesc_genelist)

BRCL_skin_merged <- AddModuleScore_UCell(
  BRCL_skin_merged,
  features = gene_set_ucel
)


## Spatial Visualization of Senescence Scores

SpatialFeaturePlot(
  BRCL_skin_merged,
  images = c("X002"),
  feature = c("Senescence_UCell"),
  image.alpha = 0,
  pt.size.factor = 3200
)

SpatialFeaturePlot(
  BRCL_skin_merged,
  images = c("X006"),
  feature = c("Senescence_UCell"),
  image.alpha = 0,
  pt.size.factor = 1000
)

SpatialFeaturePlot(
  BRCL_skin_merged,
  images = c("X009"),
  feature = c("Senescence_UCell"),
  image.alpha = 0,
  pt.size.factor = 900
)

SpatialFeaturePlot(
  BRCL_skin_merged,
  images = c("X010"),
  feature = c("Senescence_UCell"),
  image.alpha = 0,
  pt.size.factor = 1200
)


## Identification of Senescent Spots Using Gaussian Mixture Modeling

# x is the numeric vector containing Senescence_UCell values
x <- BRCL_skin_merged$Senescence_UCell

mclust_fit_1to4 <- Mclust(x, G = 1:4)

summary(mclust_fit_1to4)

plot(mclust_fit_1to4, what = "density")

## Extract Gaussian Mixture Model Parameters

params <- mclust_fit_1to4$parameters
G <- mclust_fit_1to4$G

## Generate Smooth Density Curves

xx <- seq(
  min(x),
  max(x),
  length.out = 400
)

## Compute Density for Each Mixture Component

dens_comp <- sapply(1:G, function(g) {
  
  dnorm(
    xx,
    mean = params$mean[g],
    sd = sqrt(params$variance$sigmasq)
  ) * params$pro[g]
})

## Compute Total Density

dens_total <- rowSums(dens_comp)

## Reshape Data for Visualization

df <- data.frame(
  x = xx,
  total = dens_total,
  dens_comp
)

df_long <- melt(df, id.vars = "x")

## Rename Density Curves

df_long$variable <- factor(
  df_long$variable,
  levels = c("total", "X1", "X2", "X3"),
  labels = c("Total", "Group 1", "Group 2", "Group 3")
)

## Visualization of Gaussian Mixture Density Curves

ggplot(df_long, aes(x, value, color = variable, linetype = variable)) +
  geom_line(size = 1.2) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c(
      "black",
      "#66c2a5",
      "#fc8d62",
      "#756bb1"
    )
  ) +
  scale_linetype_manual(
    values = c(
      "dashed",
      "solid",
      "solid",
      "solid"
    )
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 14) +
  labs(
    x = "Senescence_UCell",
    y = "Density",
    color = "Curve",
    title = "Gaussian Mixture Model",
    linetype = "Curve"
  ) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "right"
  )

## Add Gaussian Mixture Classification to Metadata

mclust_fit_1to4$classification

BRCL_skin_merged$Mclust4Clusters <- factor(
  mclust_fit_1to4$classification
)

mclust_fit_1to4$parameters$mean

## Classification of Senescent and Non-Senescent Spots

BRCL_skin_merged$SenescenceStatus <- ifelse(
  BRCL_skin_merged$Mclust4Clusters == 1,
  "Non-senescent",
  "Senescent"
)

metadata <- BRCL_skin_merged@meta.data

## UMAP Visualization of Senescence Status

DimPlot(
  BRCL_skin_merged,
  reduction = "umap",
  group.by = "SenescenceStatus"
) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c(
      "Senescent" = "firebrick",
      "Non-senescent" = "grey80"
    )
  )

## Cell Type Log2 Fold Enrichment Analysis Between Senescent and Non-Senescent Spots

## Generate Top 3 Cell Type Abundance Matrix of senescent spots

BRCL_skin_merged <- UpdateSeuratObject(BRCL_skin_merged)

sen_spots <- WhichCells(BRCL_skin_merged, expression = SenescenceStatus == "Senescent" )
obj_sen_spots <- subset(BRCL_skin_merged, cells = sen_spots)


plot_data_top3_filter <- plot_data_top3 %>%
  filter(rownames(plot_data_top3) %in% colnames(obj_sen_spots))


## Generate Pie Chart Visualization of Cell Type Composition

lista_por_paciente <- split(
  plot_data_top3,
  plot_data_top3$sample
)

lista_por_paciente_filter <- split(
  plot_data_top3_filter,
  plot_data_top3_filter$sample
)

ggplot() +
  geom_scatterpie(
    data = lista_por_paciente_filter[["002"]],
    aes(x = imagerow, y = imagecol),
    cols = cell_types,
    pie_scale = 0.35,
    color = NA
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = my_colors1) +
  coord_equal() +
  theme_void() +
  facet_wrap(~sample) +
  labs(title = "Cell Type Composition")


## Immune Cell Enrichment Analysis

#Grouping immune cell populations

cols_to_merge_macro <- c( 
  "Mono", "Macro1", "Macro2",  "Infmono"
)

metadata <- metadata %>%
  mutate(
    monocytes_macrophages = rowSums(across(all_of(cols_to_merge_macro)), na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  select(
    -all_of(cols_to_merge_macro)
  )


cols_to_merge_dc <- c(
  "moDC3", "moDC2", "moDC1",  "MigDC",  "DC2", "DC1" 
)

metadata <- metadata %>%
  mutate(
    DC = rowSums(across(all_of(cols_to_merge_dc)), na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  select(
    -all_of(cols_to_merge_dc)
  )

cols_to_merge_lc <- c(
  "LC1" ,"LC2", "LC3","LC4"
)

metadata <- metadata %>%
  mutate(
    LC = rowSums(across(all_of(cols_to_merge_lc)), na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  select(
    -all_of(cols_to_merge_lc)
  )

cols_to_merge_ilc <- c(
  "ILC13" ,"ILC1NK", "ILC2"
)

metadata <- metadata %>%
  mutate(
    ILC = rowSums(across(all_of(cols_to_merge_ilc)), na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  select(
    -all_of(cols_to_merge_ilc)
  )

#Grouping non-immune cell populations

cols_to_merge_ve <- c(
  "VE1",  "VE2" , "VE3" 
)

metadata <- metadata %>%
  mutate(
    VE = rowSums(across(all_of(cols_to_merge_ve)), na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  select(
    -all_of(cols_to_merge_ve)
  )


cols_to_merge_kc <- c(
  "UndifferentiatedKC.", "DifferentiatedKC.",   "DifferentiatedKC" ,   "ProliferatingKC"
)

metadata <- metadata %>%
  mutate(
    KC = rowSums(across(all_of(cols_to_merge_kc)), na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  select(
    -all_of(cols_to_merge_kc)
  )

cols_to_merge_sch <- c(
  "Schwann2", "Schwann1"
)

metadata <- metadata %>%
  mutate(
    Schwann = rowSums(across(all_of(cols_to_merge_sch)), na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  select(
    -all_of(cols_to_merge_sch)
  )

cols_to_merge_peri <- c(
  "Pericyte2inflamm", "Pericyte1noninflamm"
)

metadata <- metadata %>%
  mutate(
    Pericyte = rowSums(across(all_of(cols_to_merge_peri)), na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  select(
    -all_of(cols_to_merge_peri)
  )

cols_to_merge_le <- c( 
  "LE2"  ,  "LE1"
)

metadata <- metadata %>%
  mutate(
    LE = rowSums(across(all_of(cols_to_merge_le)), na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  select(
    -all_of(cols_to_merge_le)
  )

cols_to_merge_fibs <- c(
  "F1" ,   "F2"  , "F3"
)

metadata <- metadata %>%
  mutate(
    Fibro = rowSums(across(all_of(cols_to_merge_fibs)), na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  select(
    -all_of(cols_to_merge_fibs)
  )


immune_cells <- c(  
  "Mastcell"  ,  "NK" , "Plasma"  , "Tc"  ,"Th"  , "Treg","monocytes_macrophages" , "DC" , "LC", "ILC"
)

non_immune_cells <- c(
  "Melanocyte" , "VE","KC","Schwann" , "Pericyte","LE", "Fibro"  
)


SenescenceStatus <-  metadata[metadata$SenescenceStatus == "Senescent", ]

NON_SenescenceStatus <- metadata[metadata$SenescenceStatus == "Non-senescent", ]


NON_SenescenceStatus_immune <- NON_SenescenceStatus %>%
  select(immune_cells)

NON_SenescenceStatus_non_immune <- NON_SenescenceStatus %>%
  select(non_immune_cells)

SenescenceStatus_immune <- SenescenceStatus %>%
  select(immune_cells)

SenescenceStatus_non_immune <- SenescenceStatus %>%
  select(non_immune_cells)

SenescenceStatus_immune$group <- "Senescent"
NON_SenescenceStatus_immune$group <- "Nonsenescent"

df_immune <- rbind(
  SenescenceStatus_immune,
  NON_SenescenceStatus_immune
)

df_immune_long <- df_immune %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = all_of(immune_cells),
    names_to = "cell_type",
    values_to = "prop"
  )

df_immune_summary <- df_immune_long %>%
  group_by(group, cell_type) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_prop = mean(prop),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

df_immune_logFE <- df_immune_summary %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = group,
    values_from = mean_prop
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    log2FE = log2(
      (Senescent + 1e-6) /
        (Nonsenescent + 1e-6)
    )
  )

df_stats <- df_immune_long %>%
  group_by(cell_type) %>%
  summarise(
    p_value = wilcox.test(prop ~ group)$p.value
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    p_adj = p.adjust(
      p_value,
      method = "BH"
    )
  )

df_immune_logFE <- left_join(
  df_immune_logFE,
  df_stats,
  by = "cell_type"
)

## Visualization of Immune Cell Enrichment

ggplot(
  df_immune_logFE,
  aes(
    x = cell_type,
    y = log2FE,
    fill = log2FE > 0
  )
) +
  geom_col() +
  coord_flip() +
  geom_hline(
    yintercept = 0,
    linetype = "dashed"
  ) +
  labs(
    y = "log2 Fold Enrichment (Senescent vs Non-senescent)",
    x = "Cell type"
  ) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "lightblue3",
      "coral3"
    )
  )

## Non-Immune Cell Enrichment Analysis

SenescenceStatus_non_immune$group <- "Senescent"
NON_SenescenceStatus_non_immune$group <- "Nonsenescent"

df_non_immune <- rbind(
  SenescenceStatus_non_immune,
  NON_SenescenceStatus_non_immune
)

df_non_immune_long <- df_non_immune %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = all_of(non_immune_cells),
    names_to = "cell_type",
    values_to = "prop"
  )

df_non_immune_summary <- df_non_immune_long %>%
  group_by(group, cell_type) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_prop = mean(prop),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

df_non_immune_logFE <- df_non_immune_summary %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = group,
    values_from = mean_prop
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    log2FE = log2(
      (Senescent + 1e-6) /
        (Nonsenescent + 1e-6)
    )
  )

df_non_stats <- df_non_immune_long %>%
  group_by(cell_type) %>%
  summarise(
    p_value = wilcox.test(prop ~ group)$p.value
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    p_adj = p.adjust(
      p_value,
      method = "BH"
    )
  )

df_non_immune_logFE <- left_join(
  df_non_immune_logFE,
  df_non_stats,
  by = "cell_type"
)

## Visualization of Non-Immune Cell Enrichment

ggplot(
  df_non_immune_logFE,
  aes(
    x = cell_type,
    y = log2FE,
    fill = log2FE > 0
  )
) +
  geom_col() +
  coord_flip() +
  geom_hline(
    yintercept = 0,
    linetype = "dashed"
  ) +
  labs(
    y = "log2 Fold Enrichment (Senescent vs Non-senescent)",
    x = "Cell type"
  ) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "lightblue3",
      "coral3"
    )
  )




## Differential Expression Analysis Between Senescent and Non-Senescent Spots

BRCL_sen_all_DEG <- FindMarkers(
  object = BRCL_skin_merged,
  ident.1 = "Senescent",
  ident.2 = "Non-senescent",
  group.by = "SenescenceStatus",
  assay = "SCT",
  test.use = "wilcox"
)


## Classification of Differentially Expressed Genes

BRCL_sen_all_DEG$diffexpressed <- "NO"

# Upregulated genes
BRCL_sen_all_DEG$diffexpressed[
  BRCL_sen_all_DEG$avg_log2FC > 0.6 &
    BRCL_sen_all_DEG$p_val_adj < 0.05
] <- "UP"

# Downregulated genes
BRCL_sen_all_DEG$diffexpressed[
  BRCL_sen_all_DEG$avg_log2FC < -0.6 &
    BRCL_sen_all_DEG$p_val_adj < 0.05
] <- "DOWN"

## Separate Upregulated and Downregulated Gene Sets

all_upregulated_BRCL_sen_all_DEG <- BRCL_sen_all_DEG[
  BRCL_sen_all_DEG$diffexpressed == "UP",
]

all_downregulated_BRCL_sen_all_DEG <- BRCL_sen_all_DEG[
  BRCL_sen_all_DEG$diffexpressed == "DOWN",
]

all_upregulated_BRCL_sen_all_DEG$genes <- rownames(
  all_upregulated_BRCL_sen_all_DEG
)

all_downregulated_BRCL_sen_all_DEG$genes <- rownames(
  all_downregulated_BRCL_sen_all_DEG
)

top50_up_sen <- head(
  all_upregulated_BRCL_sen_all_DEG$genes, 50
)

top_up_sen <- all_upregulated_BRCL_sen_all_DEG$avg_log2FC
names(top_up_sen) <- rownames(all_upregulated_BRCL_sen_all_DEG)
top_up_sen <- sort(top_up_sen, decreasing = TRUE)
head_sen <- head(names(top_up_sen),30)

## Volcano Plot Visualization of Differentially Expressed Genes

EnhancedVolcano(
  BRCL_sen_all_DEG,
  lab = rownames(BRCL_sen_all_DEG),
  x = "avg_log2FC",
  y = "p_val_adj",
  selectLab = head_sen,
  pCutoff = 0.05,
  FCcutoff = 0.6,
  col = c(
    "grey85",
    "grey30",
    "royalblue",
    "brown2"
  ),
  boxedLabels = TRUE,
  colAlpha = 4 / 5,
  legendPosition = "right",
  legendLabSize = 12,
  legendIconSize = 4.0,
  drawConnectors = TRUE,
  ylim = c(0, 100)
) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )

## Gene Set Enrichment Analysis Using SenMayo Signature

senmayo <- read.csv("D:/RDATA/senmayo.csv")

geneList <- BRCL_sen_all_DEG$avg_log2FC

names(geneList) <- rownames(BRCL_sen_all_DEG)

geneList <- sort(
  geneList,
  decreasing = TRUE
)

senmayo_list <- list(SenMayo = senmayo)

TERM2GENE <- data.frame(
  term = "SenMayo",
  gene = senmayo
)

gsea_res <- GSEA(
  geneList = geneList,
  TERM2GENE = TERM2GENE,
  pvalueCutoff = 0.05
)

gs_id <- "SenMayo"

## Extract GSEA Statistics

res_row <- gsea_res@result[
  gsea_res@result$ID == gs_id,
]

NES <- round(res_row$NES, 3)

pval <- signif(
  res_row$pvalue,
  3
)

title_txt <- paste0(
  gs_id,
  " (NES = ",
  NES,
  ", p = ",
  pval
)

## Visualization of SenMayo GSEA Results

gseaplot2(
  gsea_res,
  geneSetID = gs_id,
  title = title_txt,
  pvalue_table = FALSE,
  ES_geom = "line",
  color = "green4",
  base_size = 12
)

# Gene Set Enrichment Analysis Using SASP Signature

sasp_genes <- read.csv("D:/RDATA/SASP_genes.csv")

geneList <-  BRCL_sen_all_DEG$avg_log2FC
names(geneList) <- rownames(BRCL_sen_all_DEG)
geneList <- sort(geneList, decreasing = TRUE)

sasp_list <- list(SASP = sasp_genes)
TERM2GENE <- data.frame(term = "SASP", gene = sasp_genes)

gsea_sasp <- GSEA(
  geneList = geneList,
  TERM2GENE = TERM2GENE,
  pvalueCutoff = 0.05)


gs_id <- "SASP"

res_row <- gsea_sasp@result[gsea_sasp@result$ID == gs_id, ]

NES  <- round(res_row$NES, 3)
pval <- signif(res_row$pvalue, 3)


title_txt <- paste0(gs_id, " (NES = ", NES, ", p = ", pval)


## Visualization of SASP GSEA Results

gseaplot2(gsea_sasp,geneSetID = gs_id, title = title_txt, pvalue_table = FALSE,
          ES_geom = "line",color = "green4", base_size = 12)







#####
## Senescence-Associated Inflammation and Cytotoxicity Analysis Pipeline 

## Inflammation-related gene set analysis (DotPlot preparation)


# Inflammation gene list import
inflamma_genelist <- read.csv("D:/RDATA/Inflammation.csv")
vetor_inflamma_gelist <- inflamma_genelist[,1]

# Subsetting differentially expressed genes in senescent spots
up_inflamm_sen <- all_upregulated_BRCL_sen_all_DEG[all_upregulated_BRCL_sen_all_DEG$genes %in% vetor_inflamma_gelist,]
down_inflamm_sen <- all_downregulated_BRCL_sen_all_DEG[all_downregulated_BRCL_sen_all_DEG$genes %in% vetor_inflamma_gelist,]

all_inflamm_sen <- rbind(up_inflamm_sen, down_inflamm_sen)



## Chemokine-related gene set analysis (DotPlot preparation)


chemok_genelist <- read.csv("D:/RDATA/Chemokine.csv")
vetor_chemok_genelist <- chemok_genelist[,1]

up_chemok_sen <- all_upregulated_BRCL_sen_all_DEG[all_upregulated_BRCL_sen_all_DEG$genes %in% vetor_chemok_genelist,]
down_chemok_sen <- all_downregulated_BRCL_sen_all_DEG[all_downregulated_BRCL_sen_all_DEG$genes %in% vetor_chemok_genelist,]

all_chemok_sen <- rbind(up_chemok_sen, down_chemok_sen)



## Combined senescence-associated inflammatory feature selection


sen_features <- rbind(all_chemok_sen, all_inflamm_sen)

sen_features <- sen_features %>%
  dplyr::arrange(desc(avg_log2FC)) %>%
  dplyr::pull(genes)


## DotPlot visualization of inflammatory and chemokine signatures


DotPlot(
  BRCL_skin_merged,
  features = sen_features,
  group.by = "SenescenceStatus",
  assay = "SCT",
  col.min = 0
) + 
  scale_color_gradientn(colours = c("gray40", "firebrick")) +
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold", vjust = 0.1),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold", vjust = 2),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 9),
    legend.position = "right"
  ) + 
  coord_flip()



#####
##Avaliating association between Cytotoxicity and Senescence

cytx_genelist <- c(
  "GZMA", "GZMB", "GZMK",
  "PRF1", "GNLY", "NKG7"
)

## Visualization of Individual Marker Gene Distribution

SpatialFeaturePlot(
  BRCL_skin_merged,
  feature = c(
    "GZMA", "GZMB", "GZMK",
    "PRF1", "GNLY", "NKG7"
  ),
  image.alpha = 0,
  images = "X002",
  pt.size.factor = 3200
)


## Calculation of UCell Module Scores

gene_set_ucel2 <- list(Cytotoxicity = cytx_genelist)

BRCL_skin_merged <- AddModuleScore_UCell(
  BRCL_skin_merged,
  features = gene_set_ucel2
)


## Spatial Visualization of Cytotoxicity Scores

SpatialFeaturePlot(
  BRCL_skin_merged,
  images = c("X002"),
  feature = c("Cytotoxicity_UCell"),
  image.alpha = 0,
  pt.size.factor = 3200
)

SpatialFeaturePlot(
  BRCL_skin_merged,
  images = c("X006"),
  feature = c("Cytotoxicity_UCell"),
  image.alpha = 0,
  pt.size.factor = 1000
)

SpatialFeaturePlot(
  BRCL_skin_merged,
  images = c("X009"),
  feature = c("Cytotoxicity_UCell"),
  image.alpha = 0,
  pt.size.factor = 900
)

SpatialFeaturePlot(
  BRCL_skin_merged,
  images = c("X010"),
  feature = c("Cytotoxicity_UCell"),
  image.alpha = 0,
  pt.size.factor = 1200
)


## Classification of Highly Cytotoxic Spots Based on Upper Quartile Threshold


quantile(BRCL_skin_merged@meta.data$Cytotoxicity_UCell)

BRCL_skin_merged$groupUCell2 <- ifelse(
  BRCL_skin_merged$Cytotoxicity_UCell >= quantile(
    BRCL_skin_merged@meta.data$Cytotoxicity_UCell,
    0.75
  ),
  "Highly cytotoxic spots",
  "Non-cytotoxic spots"
)

## Spatial Visualization of Cytotoxic status

SpatialDimPlot(
  BRCL_skin_merged,
  images = "X002",
  group.by = "groupUCell2",
  label = FALSE,
  repel = TRUE,
  image.alpha = 0,
  pt.size.factor = 3400,
  label.size = 8,
  alpha = 0.8,
  cols = c(
    "Highly cytotoxic spots" = "coral2",
    "Non-cytotoxic spots" = "cyan3"
  )
) +
  theme(
    legend.text = element_text(size = 10)
  )



## Senescence score comparison between cytotoxic groups

metadata <- BRCL_skin_merged@meta.data

ggplot(metadata, aes(x = groupUCell2, y = Senescence_UCell, fill = groupUCell2)) + 
  geom_violin(scale = "width", trim = TRUE, color = "black", alpha = 0.7) + 
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.05, alpha = 0.8) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("coral2", "#00bfc4ff")) +
  theme_bw() +
  stat_compare_means(method = "wilcox.test", label = "p.signif", size = 6, hjust = -1.5, vjust = 1.5) +
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )
)

res <- wilcox.test(
  Senescence_UCell ~ groupUCell2,
  data = metadata
)

#########
## Cytotoxicity stratification within senescent and non-senescent spots


BRCL_skin_copy <- BRCL_skin_merged

q75 <- quantile(BRCL_skin_copy$Cytotoxicity_UCell, 0.75)

BRCL_skin_copy$Sen_spots_cytx_class <- ifelse(
  BRCL_skin_copy$Mclust4Clusters %in% c(2, 3) &
    BRCL_skin_copy$Cytotoxicity_UCell >= q75,
  "Senescents & Cytotoxic",
  ifelse(
    BRCL_skin_copy$Mclust4Clusters %in% c(2, 3) &
      BRCL_skin_copy$Cytotoxicity_UCell < q75,
    "Senescents & Non-Cytotoxic",
    ifelse(
      BRCL_skin_copy$Mclust4Clusters == 1 &
        BRCL_skin_copy$Cytotoxicity_UCell >= q75,
      "Non-Senescents & Cytotoxic",
      "Non-Senescents & Non-Cytotoxic"
    )
  )
)


## Spatial visualization in representative patient sample


coords <- GetTissueCoordinates(BRCL_skin_copy@images[["X002"]]) %>% 
  as.data.frame()

coords$spot <- rownames(coords)

df <- coords %>%
  left_join(
    data.frame(
      spot = rownames(BRCL_skin_copy@meta.data),
      cytx = BRCL_skin_copy$Cytotoxicity_UCell,
      class = BRCL_skin_copy$Sen_spots_cytx_class,
      group = BRCL_skin_copy$groupUCell2
    ),
    by = "spot"
  )


df_filter <- df %>%
  filter(group == "Highly cytotoxic spots")


## Cytotoxicity spatial distribution plot

ggplot() +
  geom_point(data = df_filter, aes(x = imagecol, y = imagerow, color = cytx), size = 2) +
  scale_color_gradientn(colors = brewer.pal(5, "YlOrRd")) +
  coord_fixed() +
  theme_void()


## Cytotoxicity stratified by senescence class

ggplot(df_filter) +
  geom_point(aes(x = imagecol, y = imagerow, color = cytx), size = 2) +
  scale_color_gradientn(colors = brewer.pal(5, "YlOrRd")) +
  coord_fixed() +
  theme_void() +
  facet_wrap(~ class)


## Quantification by Violin plot

ggplot(df_filter, aes(x = class, y = cytx, 
                      fill = class)) +
  geom_violin(scale= "count", trim = FALSE, color = "black", alpha = 0.8) + 
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.1, outlier.shape = NA)+
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("grey", "firebrick")) +  
  stat_compare_means(method = "wilcox.test", 
                     label = "p.signif", size= 9, hjust=-1.2) + 
  theme_bw(base_size = 14) +
  labs(x = "Senescence Class", y = "Cytotoxicity Score") +
  theme( panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
         panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
         legend.position = "none",
         axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
         axis.text = element_text(color = "black"),
         plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)
  )

res <- wilcox.test(
  cytx ~ class,
  data = df_filter
)

##########
## Spatial definition of Senescence-Sensitive Regions (SSR)

coords <- GetTissueCoordinates(BRCL_skin_merged, image = image_names[i])

all_coords[[i]] <- coords

## Combine coordinates across samples
spatial_coords <- do.call(rbind, all_coords)
print(head(spatial_coords))



## Spatial enrichment of senescent spots and density estimation

spatial_coords$sen <- colnames(BRCL_skin_merged) %in% sen_spots

spatial_coords$sample <- BRCL_skin_merged$orig.ident

df_sen <- spatial_coords %>% filter(sen == TRUE)
df_por_paciente <- split(df_sen, df_sen$sample)

scale.col <- c("white", "grey90", "red")

## Density plot for representative patient

ggplot(df_por_paciente[["002"]], aes(x = imagerow, y = imagecol)) +
  stat_density_2d(
    aes(fill = after_stat(level)),
    geom = "density_2d_filled",
    colour = "ivory",
    linewidth = 0.3,
    n = 300,
    h = c(20, 20)
  ) + 
  geom_point(alpha = 0.1) +
  scale_fill_gradientn(colours = scale.col) +
  coord_fixed() + 
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )

ggplot(df_por_paciente[["006"]], aes(x = imagerow, y = imagecol)) +
  stat_density_2d(
    aes(fill = after_stat(level)),
    geom = "density_2d_filled",
    colour = "ivory",
    linewidth = 0.3,
    n = 300,
    h = c(20, 20)
  ) + 
  geom_point(alpha = 0.1) +
  scale_fill_gradientn(colours = scale.col) +
  coord_fixed() + 
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )

ggplot(df_por_paciente[["009"]], aes(x = imagerow, y = imagecol)) +
  stat_density_2d(
    aes(fill = after_stat(level)),
    geom = "density_2d_filled",
    colour = "ivory",
    linewidth = 0.3,
    n = 300,
    h = c(20, 20)
  ) + 
  geom_point(alpha = 0.1) +
  scale_fill_gradientn(colours = scale.col) +
  coord_fixed() + 
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )

ggplot(df_por_paciente[["010"]], aes(x = imagerow, y = imagecol)) +
  stat_density_2d(
    aes(fill = after_stat(level)),
    geom = "density_2d_filled",
    colour = "ivory",
    linewidth = 0.3,
    n = 300,
    h = c(20, 20)
  ) + 
  geom_point(alpha = 0.1) +
  scale_fill_gradientn(colours = scale.col) +
  coord_fixed() + 
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )
